_comment: Trigger evals for the dependency-auditor dispatch description per agentskills.io spec. ~20 queries 60/40 train/val. Validation split is the ship gate.

should_trigger.query: Run a security audit on zava-storefront/security-fixtures/
What CVEs are open in security-fixtures right now?
Do we have any vulnerable npm packages in security-fixtures?
Generate a remediation report for security-fixtures vulnerabilities
Triage the npm audit findings on security-fixtures
Our security-fixtures app keeps showing CVE warnings — what should we do?
Security review of security-fixtures dependency tree
PR opened bumping security-fixtures/package.json — review it
I need a markdown report ranking our security-fixtures vulnerabilities

should_not_trigger.query: Refactor the auth module in zava-storefront/src/auth/
should_not_trigger.reason: source code change, not security audit

should_not_trigger.query: Update package-lock.json after we ran npm install
